'''Antar 5''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Antar/Legends|Antar]] colonized by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] as a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation. Located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], the moon was situated in the [[Prindaar system/Legends|Prindaar system]].

==History==
Antar 5, along with its sister moon [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]], joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] early in its history, sometime between [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]] and [[22,000 BBY/Legends|22,000 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

Settled by the Gotal, the moon was mined for its rich resources, most likely including [[Magnetite/Legends|magnetite]]. Drawn into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] thrall during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the moon became a member state of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as of [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].
